title: FNS (FemSnowGolems)
description:
Ever wanted a new someone in your Minecraft world
Someone a bit more "blocky"?
Well this mod isn't for you it just makes the Snow Golems female lol
body: This is an OLD resource pack I made about a year ago, I couldn't figure out modrith and what I needed so I thought might as well try again and here we are! Hope you enjoy this pack.
